name: axon
description: Root-cause debugging & vulnerability MCP server: localize bugs, verify fixes, and triage security findings with adversarial refutation.

interface.shortDescription: Root-cause debugging and vulnerability tools for Codex
interface.longDescription: Axon exposes MCP tools that help Codex localize bugs, run focused verification, inspect runtime failures, rank patches, and refute security findings before reporting them.
defaultPrompt: Use Axon to localize this failure.
Use Axon to verify this fix and rank candidate patches.
Use Axon to triage these security findings.
